description: Shape layer with one filled rectangle and animated layer position.
bugClass: Animated layer position was previously judged from shifted PNGs instead of numeric translation.

frames.rationale: First root source frame records the authored initial state.
Interior source frame catches interpolation and transform composition errors.
Last integer source frame before exclusive op=10 checks the end boundary.

description: Static centered rectangle with a solid fill.
bugClass: Baseline geometry and fill color must be correct before animation is considered.

Last integer source frame before exclusive op=10 checks the end boundary.

description: Rectangle with a linear animated layer position.

description: A foreground layer appears only inside its half-open frame window.
bugClass: Layer ip/op semantics must be proven at numeric frame boundaries.

frames.rationale: Frame before the gated layer in-point proves ordinary content is still absent before ip.
Frame at the gated layer in-point proves Lottie uses ip inclusively.
Frame at the gated layer out-point proves Lottie uses op exclusively.
Last root frame proves the background remains after the gated layer leaves.
